content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(1, 3, 1), (4, 5, 1), (3, 9, 2), (6, 7, 2), (3, 4, 3), (1, 5, 6), (3, 6, 8), (5, 6, 8), (1, 7, 10), (4, 7, 10), (5, 8, 12), (0, 3, 13), (1, 9, 15), (3, 8, 17)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 1 exactly at time 15.

First, we will scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node:

* Edge (1, 3, 1) has node 1 and time 1. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (4, 5, 1) has node 4 and time 1. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (3, 9, 2) has node 3 and time 2. -> Ignore.
* Edge (6, 7, 2) has node 6 and time 2. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (3, 4, 3) has node 3 and time 3. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (1, 5, 6) has node 1 and time 6. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (3, 6, 8) has node 3 and time 8. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (5, 6, 8) has node 5 and time 8. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (1, 7, 10) has node 1 and time 10. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (4, 7, 10) has node 4 and time 10. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (5, 8, 12) has node 5 and time 12. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 3, 13) has node 0 and time 13. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (1, 9, 15) has node 1 and time 15. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (3, 8, 17) has node 3 and time 17. -> Add node 8.

Now we have the following nodes linked with node 1 at time 15:
[5, 6, 7, 8, 9]

Answer: [5, 6, 7, 8, 9]
